subject: FW: FOR JEFFREY'S ATTENTION
body:
From: egneurocog@aol.com [mailto:egneurocog@aol.com] 
Sent: Tuesday, March 18, 2008 2:36 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Cc: Lesley Groff
Subject: FOR JEFFREY'S ATTENTION

 

Dear Jeffrey,

You said this morning that you wanted to see Tsodyks' actual papers.
Coincidentally, the Science issue I have just received in the mail
contains a paper with him as the senior author (see attachment). I
assume that the other two are his post-docs, graduate students, or
junior faculty. I've just read the paper; it is excellent work. Science,
of course, is the most prestigious scientific journal in the world. Very
few scientists get to publish there in the course of their whole
careers.

Best wishes,


Nick

Elkhonon Goldberg, Ph.D., ABPP

Clinical Professor of Neurology
New York University School of Medicine

Diplomate
American Board of Professional Psychology
in Clinical Neuropsychology

315 West 57th Street
Suite 401
New York, NY 10019
USA

tel +1 212 541 6412
fax +1 212 765 7158
egneurocog@aol.com
elkhonon.goldberg@med.nyu.edu
www.elkhonongoldberg.com
